name: Potted History of Worcestershire Sauce. (Long)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine vinegar and sugar until the sugar is fully dissolved.
2. Add soy sauce, molasses, minced shallots, filleted anchovy, grated ginger, chili flakes, ground cloves, nutmeg, and cardamom to the bowl.
3. Mix all ingredients thoroughly until well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture into a clean glass bottle or jar with a tight-fitting lid.
5. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
6. The sauce will improve in flavor over time as it ages.
